scripts.skills:verify: pnpm runtime-core:build && node --input-type=module -e "import { composeRunPrompts, resolveChatOrchestration, verifyChatCatalog } from './packages/runtime-core/dist/index.js'; const o=resolveChatOrchestration({mode:'auto'}); const cat=verifyChatCatalog(); if(!cat.ok) throw new Error('catalog missing: '+cat.missingSlugs.join(',')); const r=composeRunPrompts({mode:'auto',userText:'test',processSkill:o.baseProcessSkill,platformNormSkill:o.platformNormSkill,chatCatalog:o.catalog}); if(o.baseProcessSkill!=='skill-qa') throw new Error('expected skill-qa, got '+o.baseProcessSkill); if(!r.systemPrompt.includes('<available_skills>')) throw new Error('catalog not in system'); if(r.meta.orchestrationMode!=='hybrid-steer') throw new Error('orchestrationMode'); if(r.meta.injectedSlugs.length!==2) throw new Error('expected 2 injected slugs, got '+r.meta.injectedSlugs.length); if(!r.meta.injectedSlugs.includes('skill-qa')) throw new Error('skill-qa not injected'); console.log('ok', r.meta.catalogSlugs?.length, 'slugs', r.systemPrompt.length);"
scripts.smoke:3d:quick: pnpm skills:verify-3d && pnpm smoke:3d:module-routes && pnpm smoke:3d:home-suggestions && pnpm smoke:3d:ai-ui-parts && pnpm smoke:3d:file-edit && pnpm smoke:3d:licenses && pnpm smoke:3d:runtime-fetch && pnpm smoke:3d:toolchain && pnpm smoke:3d:parameters && pnpm smoke:3d:dxf && pnpm smoke:3d:svg-preview && pnpm smoke:3d:export && pnpm smoke:3d:wasm-preview
scripts.smoke:3d:claude: pnpm runtime-core:build && pnpm -C companion exec tsx ../scripts/smoke-3d-real-claude.ts
scripts.smoke:video: pnpm smoke:video:module-routes && pnpm smoke:video:ai-ui-parts && pnpm smoke:video:web-presentation && pnpm smoke:video:reel && pnpm smoke:video:auto
scripts.mvp:verify: pnpm skills:verify && pnpm smoke:companion:codex && pnpm smoke:companion:claude && node scripts/smoke-companion-any.mjs
scripts.skills:verify-ppt: pnpm skills:sync-ppt && pnpm runtime-core:build && node --input-type=module -e "import { loadSkill, loadSkillBundle } from './packages/runtime-core/dist/index.js'; const b=loadSkillBundle({processSkill:'skill-ppt-pitch-deck',platformNormSkill:'skill-platform-research-norms'}); if(b.missing.length) throw new Error('missing: '+b.missing.join(',')); const deck=loadSkill('skill-ppt-deck'); const html=loadSkill('skill-ppt-html-studio'); if(!deck||!html) throw new Error('ppt skills not on disk'); console.log('ok ppt', b.process?.slug, 'refs', b.process?.referencePaths.length, 'html-studio', html.referencePaths.length);"
scripts.desktop:pack: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack
scripts.desktop:pack:dir: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack:dir
scripts.desktop:pack:release: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack:release
scripts.desktop:pack:ci: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack:ci
scripts.desktop:pack:ci:release: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack:ci:release
